query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
-- Lesson 6: Sermon Delivery (750024)
(750024, 'Effective sermon delivery requires:', 'multiple_choice', '["Monotone voice","Eye contact, vocal variety, and appropriate gestures","Reading word for word","Avoiding the audience"]', 'Eye contact, vocal variety, and appropriate gestures', 1),
(750024, 'The preacher''s voice should:', 'multiple_choice', '["Be monotonous","Vary in pitch, pace, and volume","Always be loud","Always be soft"]', 'Vary in pitch, pace, and volume', 2),
(750024, 'Eye contact with the congregation:', 'multiple_choice', '["Should be avoided","Creates connection and engagement","Is unprofessional","Distracts the preacher"]', 'Creates connection and engagement', 3),
(750024, 'Gestures in preaching should be:', 'multiple_choice', '["Avoided entirely","Natural and purposeful","Constant and exaggerated","Identical for every sermon"]', 'Natural and purposeful', 4),
(750024, 'The use of notes in preaching:', 'multiple_choice', '["Is always wrong","Depends on the preacher and context","Is always required","Shows lack of preparation"]', 'Depends on the preacher and context', 5),
(750024, 'Nervousness before preaching:', 'multiple_choice', '["Indicates lack of calling","Is normal and can be channeled positively","Should be hidden at all costs","Means you should stop preaching"]', 'Is normal and can be channeled positively', 6),
(750024, 'The pace of delivery should:', 'multiple_choice', '["Always be fast","Vary based on content and emphasis","Always be slow","Never change"]', 'Vary based on content and emphasis', 7),
(750024, 'Pauses in preaching:', 'multiple_choice', '["Show lack of preparation","Allow emphasis and reflection","Should be avoided","Indicate nervousness"]', 'Allow emphasis and reflection', 8),
(750024, 'Physical presence in the pulpit should convey:', 'multiple_choice', '["Arrogance","Confidence and authenticity","Nervousness","Indifference"]', 'Confidence and authenticity', 9),
(750024, 'The relationship between content and delivery is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Unimportant","Both are essential for effective communication","Only content matters","Only delivery matters"]', 'Both are essential for effective communication', 10),
(750024, 'Describe strategies for improving sermon delivery skills.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Practice, feedback, recording, and continuous improvement', 11),

-- Lesson 7: Preaching Different Genres (750025)
(750025, 'Different biblical genres require:', 'multiple_choice', '["Identical preaching approaches","Genre-sensitive interpretation and preaching","Ignoring the genre","Only topical treatment"]', 'Genre-sensitive interpretation and preaching', 1),
(750025, 'Preaching Old Testament narrative should:', 'multiple_choice', '["Moralize every detail","Identify the theological message and its connection to Christ","Ignore the story","Focus only on characters"]', 'Identify the theological message and its connection to Christ', 2),
(750025, 'When preaching poetry (like Psalms), the preacher should:', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignore poetic features","Attend to imagery, parallelism, and emotional content","Treat it as prose","Avoid application"]', 'Attend to imagery, parallelism, and emotional content', 3),
(750025, 'Preaching prophetic literature requires understanding:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only future predictions","Historical context, covenant themes, and fulfillment","Only moral lessons","Only judgment themes"]', 'Historical context, covenant themes, and fulfillment', 4),
(750025, 'Wisdom literature (Proverbs, Ecclesiastes) should be preached with attention to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Absolute promises","General principles and their proper application","Ignoring context","Only positive messages"]', 'General principles and their proper application', 5),
(750025, 'Preaching the Gospels involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignoring Jesus","Understanding Jesus as the central figure and His kingdom message","Only moral examples","Avoiding theology"]', 'Understanding Jesus as the central figure and His kingdom message', 6),
(750025, 'Epistles should be preached with attention to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignoring context","The original audience, occasion, and theological argument","Only isolated verses","Personal preferences"]', 'The original audience, occasion, and theological argument', 7),
(750025, 'Apocalyptic literature (Revelation) requires:', 'multiple_choice', '["Literal interpretation of every symbol","Understanding symbolic language and its theological message","Ignoring it entirely","Date-setting"]', 'Understanding symbolic language and its theological message', 8),
(750025, 'Parables should be preached by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Allegorizing every detail","Identifying the main point and its application","Ignoring context","Making up meanings"]', 'Identifying the main point and its application', 9),
(750025, 'Genre awareness helps the preacher to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Complicate the message","Interpret and apply Scripture accurately","Avoid difficult texts","Impress the audience"]', 'Interpret and apply Scripture accurately', 10),
(750025, 'Explain how genre affects the interpretation and preaching of a biblical text.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Genre determines how to read, interpret, and apply the text', 11),

-- Lesson 8: Topical and Thematic Preaching (750026)
(750026, 'Topical preaching is organized around:', 'multiple_choice', '["A single text","A topic or theme with multiple texts","No biblical texts","Personal opinions"]', 'A topic or theme with multiple texts', 1),
(750026, 'The danger of topical preaching is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Being too biblical","Using texts out of context to support predetermined ideas","Being too organized","Having clear points"]', 'Using texts out of context to support predetermined ideas', 2),
(750026, 'Topical preaching is appropriate when:', 'multiple_choice', '["Never","Addressing specific issues that require multiple texts","Avoiding difficult passages","The preacher is unprepared"]', 'Addressing specific issues that require multiple texts', 3),
(750026, 'Biblical theology helps topical preaching by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Complicating the message","Ensuring texts are understood in their canonical context","Avoiding the Old Testament","Ignoring Jesus"]', 'Ensuring texts are understood in their canonical context', 4),
(750026, 'A sermon series on a topic should:', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignore Scripture","Be grounded in careful exegesis of relevant texts","Only use favorite verses","Avoid application"]', 'Be grounded in careful exegesis of relevant texts', 5),
(750026, 'Thematic preaching through a book:', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignores the book''s structure","Traces major themes while respecting the book''s flow","Skips difficult sections","Only focuses on one theme"]', 'Traces major themes while respecting the book''s flow', 6),
(750026, 'Doctrinal preaching should:', 'multiple_choice', '["Be abstract and academic","Connect doctrine to life and worship","Avoid Scripture","Be boring"]', 'Connect doctrine to life and worship', 7),
(750026, 'Preaching on ethical topics requires:', 'multiple_choice', '["Personal opinions only","Biblical grounding and pastoral sensitivity","Avoiding controversy","Condemning others"]', 'Biblical grounding and pastoral sensitivity', 8),
(750026, 'The best topical sermons:', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignore context","Let the texts speak while addressing the topic","Use proof-texts","Avoid application"]', 'Let the texts speak while addressing the topic', 9),
(750026, 'Balance in preaching means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only expository preaching","Using various approaches as appropriate","Only topical preaching","Avoiding difficult topics"]', 'Using various approaches as appropriate', 10),
(750026, 'Compare the strengths and weaknesses of expository and topical preaching.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Expository ensures text-driven preaching; topical addresses specific needs', 11),

-- Lesson 9: Preaching for Transformation (750027)
(750027, 'The goal of preaching is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Information transfer only","Life transformation through the Spirit","Entertainment","Academic knowledge"]', 'Life transformation through the Spirit', 1),
(750027, 'Transformational preaching addresses:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only the mind","Mind, heart, and will","Only emotions","Only behavior"]', 'Mind, heart, and will', 2),
(750027, 'The Holy Spirit''s role in preaching is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Optional","Essential for conviction and transformation","Unnecessary","Only for the preacher"]', 'Essential for conviction and transformation', 3),
(750027, 'Application in transformational preaching should be:', 'multiple_choice', '["Vague","Specific, practical, and Spirit-dependent","Avoided","Only for new believers"]', 'Specific, practical, and Spirit-dependent', 4),
(750027, 'Preaching should call for:', 'multiple_choice', '["No response","Faith and obedience","Only intellectual assent","Emotional experience only"]', 'Faith and obedience', 5),
(750027, 'The preacher''s own spiritual life:', 'multiple_choice', '["Is irrelevant","Directly impacts the effectiveness of preaching","Should be hidden","Is unimportant"]', 'Directly impacts the effectiveness of preaching', 6),
(750027, 'Gospel-centered preaching:', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignores Christ","Connects every text to the redemptive story","Only preaches evangelistic sermons","Avoids the Old Testament"]', 'Connects every text to the redemptive story', 7),
(750027, 'Preaching should produce:', 'multiple_choice', '["Guilt without grace","Faith, hope, love, and obedience","Fear only","Complacency"]', 'Faith, hope, love, and obedience', 8),
(750027, 'The congregation''s response to preaching depends on:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only the preacher","The Spirit, the Word, and receptive hearts","Only entertainment value","Only sermon length"]', 'The Spirit, the Word, and receptive hearts', 9),
(750027, 'Measuring preaching effectiveness should consider:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only attendance","Faithfulness to Scripture and evidence of transformation","Only compliments","Only criticism"]', 'Faithfulness to Scripture and evidence of transformation', 10),
(750027, 'Describe how preaching can be both faithful to the text and transformational for hearers.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Accurate exposition combined with Spirit-empowered application', 11),

-- Lesson 10: The Preacher''s Life and Ministry (750028)
(750028, 'The preacher''s character:', 'multiple_choice', '["Is irrelevant to preaching","Directly impacts credibility and effectiveness","Should be hidden","Is unimportant"]', 'Directly impacts credibility and effectiveness', 1),
(750028, 'Personal devotional life for the preacher is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Optional","Essential for spiritual vitality","Only for sermon preparation","Unnecessary"]', 'Essential for spiritual vitality', 2),
(750028, 'The preacher should guard against:', 'multiple_choice', '["Prayer","Pride, burnout, and moral failure","Study","Rest"]', 'Pride, burnout, and moral failure', 3),
(750028, 'Accountability for preachers includes:', 'multiple_choice', '["Isolation","Relationships with other leaders and mentors","Avoiding feedback","Independence"]', 'Relationships with other leaders and mentors', 4),
(750028, 'Continuing education for preachers:', 'multiple_choice', '["Is unnecessary after seminary","Helps maintain growth and freshness","Is a waste of time","Is only for new preachers"]', 'Helps maintain growth and freshness', 5),
(750028, 'The preacher''s family:', 'multiple_choice', '["Should be neglected for ministry","Deserves priority and protection","Is unimportant","Should be hidden"]', 'Deserves priority and protection', 6),
(750028, 'Handling criticism of preaching:', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignore all criticism","Evaluate humbly and learn when appropriate","Become defensive","Stop preaching"]', 'Evaluate humbly and learn when appropriate', 7),
(750028, 'The preacher''s calling should be confirmed by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Personal desire only","Internal call, gifts, and church affirmation","Financial success","Popularity"]', 'Internal call, gifts, and church affirmation', 8),
(750028, 'Longevity in preaching ministry requires:', 'multiple_choice', '["Avoiding challenges","Spiritual disciplines, relationships, and self-care","Working constantly","Ignoring problems"]', 'Spiritual disciplines, relationships, and self-care', 9),
(750028, 'The ultimate motivation for preaching should be:', 'multiple_choice', '["Personal fame","God''s glory and people''s good","Financial gain","Professional advancement"]', 'God''s glory and people''s good', 10),
(750028, 'Reflect on the spiritual disciplines essential for sustaining a preaching ministry.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Prayer, Scripture reading, rest, accountability, and ongoing growth', 11);

(750025, 'Preaching the Gospels involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignoring Jesus","Understanding Jesus as the central figure and His kingdom message","Only moral examples","Avoiding theology"]', 'Understanding Jesus as the central figure and His kingdom message', 6),

-- Lesson 8: Topical and Thematic Preaching (750026)
(750026, 'Topical preaching is organized around:', 'multiple_choice', '["A single text","A topic or theme with multiple texts","No biblical texts","Personal opinions"]', 'A topic or theme with multiple texts', 1),
(750026, 'The danger of topical preaching is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Being too biblical","Using texts out of context to support predetermined ideas","Being too organized","Having clear points"]', 'Using texts out of context to support predetermined ideas', 2),
(750026, 'Topical preaching is appropriate when:', 'multiple_choice', '["Never","Addressing specific issues that require multiple texts","Avoiding difficult passages","The preacher is unprepared"]', 'Addressing specific issues that require multiple texts', 3),

(750026, 'A sermon series on a topic should:', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignore Scripture","Be grounded in careful exegesis of relevant texts","Only use favorite verses","Avoid application"]', 'Be grounded in careful exegesis of relevant texts', 5),
(750026, 'Thematic preaching through a book:', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignores the book''s structure","Traces major themes while respecting the book''s flow","Skips difficult sections","Only focuses on one theme"]', 'Traces major themes while respecting the book''s flow', 6),

(750026, 'Preaching on ethical topics requires:', 'multiple_choice', '["Personal opinions only","Biblical grounding and pastoral sensitivity","Avoiding controversy","Condemning others"]', 'Biblical grounding and pastoral sensitivity', 8),
(750026, 'The best topical sermons:', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignore context","Let the texts speak while addressing the topic","Use proof-texts","Avoid application"]', 'Let the texts speak while addressing the topic', 9),
(750026, 'Balance in preaching means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only expository preaching","Using various approaches as appropriate","Only topical preaching","Avoiding difficult topics"]', 'Using various approaches as appropriate', 10),
(750026, 'Compare the strengths and weaknesses of expository and topical preaching.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Expository ensures text-driven preaching; topical addresses specific needs', 11),

-- Lesson 9: Preaching for Transformation (750027)
(750027, 'The goal of preaching is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Information transfer only","Life transformation through the Spirit","Entertainment","Academic knowledge"]', 'Life transformation through the Spirit', 1),
(750027, 'Transformational preaching addresses:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only the mind","Mind, heart, and will","Only emotions","Only behavior"]', 'Mind, heart, and will', 2),
(750027, 'The Holy Spirit''s role in preaching is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Optional","Essential for conviction and transformation","Unnecessary","Only for the preacher"]', 'Essential for conviction and transformation', 3),
(750027, 'Application in transformational preaching should be:', 'multiple_choice', '["Vague","Specific, practical, and Spirit-dependent","Avoided","Only for new believers"]', 'Specific, practical, and Spirit-dependent', 4),
(750027, 'Preaching should call for:', 'multiple_choice', '["No response","Faith and obedience","Only intellectual assent","Emotional experience only"]', 'Faith and obedience', 5),
(750027, 'The preacher''s own spiritual life:', 'multiple_choice', '["Is irrelevant","Directly impacts the effectiveness of preaching","Should be hidden","Is unimportant"]', 'Directly impacts the effectiveness of preaching', 6),
(750027, 'Gospel-centered preaching:', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignores Christ","Connects every text to the redemptive story","Only preaches evangelistic sermons","Avoids the Old Testament"]', 'Connects every text to the redemptive story', 7),

(750027, 'Describe how preaching can be both faithful to the text and transformational for hearers.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Accurate exposition combined with Spirit-empowered application', 11),

-- Lesson 10: The Preacher''s Life and Ministry (750028)
(750028, 'The preacher''s character:', 'multiple_choice', '["Is irrelevant to preaching","Directly impacts credibility and effectiveness","Should be hidden","Is unimportant"]', 'Directly impacts credibility and effectiveness', 1),
(750028, 'Personal devotional life for the preacher is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Optional","Essential for spiritual vitality","Only for sermon preparation","Unnecessary"]', 'Essential for spiritual vitality', 2),
(750028, 'The preacher should guard against:', 'multiple_choice', '["Prayer","Pride, burnout, and moral failure","Study","Rest"]', 'Pride, burnout, and moral failure', 3),
(750028, 'Accountability for preachers includes:', 'multiple_choice', '["Isolation","Relationships with other leaders and mentors","Avoiding feedback","Independence"]', 'Relationships with other leaders and mentors', 4),
(750028, 'Continuing education for preachers:', 'multiple_choice', '["Is unnecessary after seminary","Helps maintain growth and freshness","Is a waste of time","Is only for new preachers"]', 'Helps maintain growth and freshness', 5),
(750028, 'The preacher''s family:', 'multiple_choice', '["Should be neglected for ministry","Deserves priority and protection","Is unimportant","Should be hidden"]', 'Deserves priority and protection', 6),
(750028, 'Handling criticism of preaching:', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignore all criticism","Evaluate humbly and learn when appropriate","Become defensive","Stop preaching"]', 'Evaluate humbly and learn when appropriate', 7),
